informal diary entry: September 18, 2023. dear dairy today was nothing special, it was exactly like it was yesterday and day before yesterday and the day before that, nothing special at all. i think about my childhood daily and how things could have been different. i feel like an unwanted human, i feel if i was not there things for my family would have been better. i am not sad i think, i think i crave for peace, i crave for the joy of life i have never experienced, i crave for the kind of life i think life is like. oh dear dairy sometimes you meet unexpected people, people you never know existed and there was this one girl i met sometime in 2022 and we could become really good friends but maybe our lives had other plans. This year i met some guy, very randomly(online) and now it feels like i've known hm for years. i never thought i could ever be friends with someone, with someone this random who is not even in the same country as me. life is beautiful right! . It was raining really hard today, i hate rain. i love premlal(our street dog) he's so sweet, there's one more dog yet to be named. i hate seeing people and animal struggle. today was not a very great day but i am happy that i got to see this day. bye!
